items.name: Resident Evil 2
items.description: A deadly virus engulfs the residents of Raccoon City in September of 1998.

items.name: Resident Evil 3
items.description: Jill Valentine is one of the last remaining people in Raccoon City to witness the atrocities Umbrella performed.

items.name: Resident Evil 7 Biohazard
items.description: Fear and isolation seep through the walls of an abandoned southern farmhouse.

items.name: Resident Evil Village
items.description: พบกับความสยองขวัญในการเอาชีวิตรอดแบบที่คุณไม่เคยสัมผัสมาก่อนในเกมภาคที่ 8 ของแฟรนไชส์ Resident Evil

items.name: Devil May Cry 5
items.description: The ultimate Devil Hunter is back in style, in the game action fans have been waiting for.

items.name: STAR WARS Jedi: Fallen Order™
items.description: คุณจะได้สวมบทบาทเป็นพาดาวันผู้ถูกทอดทิ้งที่ต้องสำเร็จการฝึกฝนของเขาด้วยตนเองทั้งด้านทักษะการใช้พลังและด้านเพลงดาบเลเซอร์พร้อมกับหนีจากการไล่ล่าของกองทัพจักรวรรดิ

items.name: Assassin's Creed® Unity
items.description: Assassin's Creed® Unity tells the story of Arno, a young man who embarks upon an extraordinary journey to expose the true powers behind the French Revolution.

items.name: State of Decay 2: Juggernaut Edition
items.description: The dead have risen and civilization has fallen. Now it's up to you to gather survivors.

items.name: Dead Cells
items.description: Dead Cells is a rogue-lite, metroidvania inspired, action-platformer.

items.name: Mafia: Definitive Edition
items.description: An inadvertent brush with the mob thrusts cabdriver Tommy Angelo into the world of organized crime.

items.name: Mortal Shell
items.description: Mortal Shell is a deep action-RPG that tests your sanity and resilience in a shattered world.

items.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
items.description: Survive your evolution in Neogene Africa starting 10 million years ago.

items.name: Raji: An Ancient Epic
items.description: A young girl named Raji has been chosen by the gods to stand against the demonic invasion of the human realm.

items.name: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
items.description: จากผู้สร้าง Heavenly Sword, Enslaved: Odyssey to the West และ DmC: Devil May Cry เตรียมตัวพบกับการเดินทางของนักรบผู้ป่าเถื่อนสู่โลกแห่งเทพนิยายและความบ้าคลั่ง

items.name: Valfaris
items.description: Set in a far corner of space, Valfaris is a heavy metal infused 2D action-platformer and the next game from the team behind Unity Awards finalist.

items.name: Daymare: 1998
items.description: DAYMARE: 1998 is a third-person survival horror game that recreates the mood of iconic titles from the '90s, with a fresh storyline.

items.name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
items.description: Fight through Mordor and uncover the truth of the spirit that compels you.

items.name: Demon Skin
items.description: Brutal Hack&Slash game with a challenging combat system plunges you into the harsh dark fantasy world to test your will and your skills.

items.name: ENDER LILIES: Quietus of the Knights
items.description: ENDER LILIES is a dark fantasy 2D action RPG about unraveling the mysteries of a destroyed kingdom.

items.name: Valheim
items.description: A brutal exploration and survival game for 1-10 players, set in a procedurally-generated purgatory inspired by viking culture.
